---
title: "White Ribbon"
subtitle: "Essays on State Craft and Citizenship"
lang: en
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [date, title, subtitle, reading-time]
  date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
  feed: true
page-layout: article
title-block-banner: false
---

::: {.intro}
*White Ribbon* publishes long-form essays on democratic institutions, regime
change, and the practice of citizenship under pressure. Our editorial
inheritance is the work of Steven Levitsky and Daniel Ziblatt — but our
ambition is to read the present.
:::
